items.label: Basalt
items.description: Fine-grained mafic volcanic rock; common in Martian plains.

items.label: Hematite
items.description: Iron oxide mineral; often forms in aqueous environments.

items.label: Olivine
items.description: Magnesium-iron silicate; weathers slowly in dry climates.

items.label: Sulfate
items.description: Evaporite mineral suite; marker of past brine activity.

items.label: Mudstone
items.description: Lithified mud; may preserve fine-scale sedimentary structure.

items.label: Iron meteorite
items.description: Metallic meteoritic iron-nickel alloy fragment.

items.label: Iron (Fe)
items.description: Trace iron sample extracted via LIBS-guided drilling.

items.label: Silicon (Si)
items.description: Trace silicon sample. Key indicator of silicate mineralogy.

items.label: Manganese (Mn)
items.description: Trace manganese — enrichment suggests oxidizing conditions.

items.label: Magnesium (Mg)
items.description: Trace magnesium from mafic mineral breakdown.

items.label: Aluminum (Al)
items.description: Trace aluminum — common in feldspar-bearing rocks.

items.label: Calcium (Ca)
items.description: Trace calcium from carbonate or sulfate precipitation.

items.label: Sodium (Na)
items.description: Trace sodium — indicator of evaporite or plagioclase.

items.label: Titanium (Ti)
items.description: Trace titanium from ilmenite or volcanic glass.

items.label: Sulfur (S)
items.description: Trace sulfur — volcanic or evaporite origin.

items.label: Nickel (Ni)
items.description: Trace nickel — meteoritic signature element.

items.label: Engineering components (EC)
items.description: Standard engineering parts kit. Used for repairs on engineering systems.

items.label: Science components (SC)
items.description: Sensors, optics, and lab subassemblies. Used for repairs on science instruments.

items.label: DAN Extractor
items.description: Deployable subsurface fluid extraction unit. Drills passively into confirmed DAN signal sites — water-ice, CO₂, or methane pockets. Must be installed at a verified signal location.

items.label: Mechatronics components (MC)
items.description: Actuators, harnesses, and mechanisms. Used for crafting buildables.

items.label: Digital components (DC)
items.description: High-reliability compute and comms modules. Used for digital subsystems.

items.label: Welding wire
items.description: Consumable filler for structural repairs in the field.

items.label: Subsurface Ice
items.description: Water ice extracted from DAN-confirmed drill sites. Used as a reagent in SAM wet chemistry analysis.

items.label: CO₂ Gas
items.description: Pressurised carbon dioxide captured from a subsurface CO₂ vent. Stored in the rover's onboard gas compartment.

items.label: Methane Gas
items.description: Pressurised methane captured from a subsurface vent. Possible biogenic origin — handle with care.

items.label: Purified Iron Oxide
items.description: High-purity Fe₂O₃ separated via wet chemistry. Potential feedstock for in-situ metal production.

items.label: Organic Extract
items.description: Volatile organic compounds captured during pyrolysis. Handle with extreme care — possible biosignature material.

items.label: Sulfur Distillate
items.description: Concentrated sulfur compounds from thermal decomposition. Pungent. Useful in chemical synthesis.

items.label: Brine Concentrate
items.description: Ancient Martian salt solution reconstituted during wet chemistry. Contains perchlorate traces.

items.label: Noble Gas Vial
items.description: Sealed micro-vial of trapped noble gases released during isotope analysis. Argon, xenon, krypton.

items.label: Clay Mineral Sample
items.description: Purified phyllosilicate fraction from mudstone dissolution. Layered structure preserved.

items.label: Meteoritic Alloy
items.description: Refined kamacite-taenite nickel-iron from meteorite wet chemistry. Extremely hard.

items.label: DSN Archaeology Module
items.description: Dual-band receiver firmware and antenna filter. Enables legacy DSN frequency reception on the UHF transceiver.

items.label: Biosignature Sample
items.description: Sealed container of isotopically anomalous organic material. The most valuable substance on Mars.

items.label: Silicate Fiber
items.description: Thin translucent amber-orange glass fibers bundled in a coil. Pulled from molten volcanic glass during high-temp pyrolysis. Lightweight structural reinforcement.

items.label: Iron Filament
items.description: Dark metallic spool of fine wire with a slight rust-red sheen. Electrodeposited from dissolved iron oxide. Weldable structural strand.

items.label: Nickel-Steel Billet
items.description: Small dense rectangular ingot, gunmetal gray with a mirror-polished cross section showing crystalline Widmanstatten texture. High-strength meteoritic alloy, cold-worked.

items.label: Perchlorate Oxidizer
items.description: Sealed cylindrical white canister with orange hazard stripes. Concentrated perchlorate salt extracted from sulfate evaporites. Reactive oxidizer for chemical processing.

items.label: Magnesium Powder
items.description: Pale silvery-white powder in a clear vacuum-sealed pouch, faintly luminescent. Refined from olivine decomposition. Lightweight metal precursor and incendiary compound.

items.label: Sulfuric Acid Vial
items.description: Small sealed glass vial of viscous amber-yellow liquid with vapor condensation inside. Distilled from sulfate thermal decomposition. Universal industrial reagent.

items.label: Organic Polymer Sheet
items.description: Thin flexible translucent sheet with a slight brownish tint, like dark cellophane. Polymerized from organic volatiles captured during mudstone pyrolysis. Sealant and insulation material.

items.label: Regolith Concrete
items.description: Rough-textured brick-red cylindrical pellet with visible mineral grain inclusions. Basalt powder sintered with sulfuric binder. Basic structural filler.
